Interface IFeature

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that return and set properties of a feature.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("D4803EE9-79F4-11D0-97FC-0080C7F79481")]
public interface IFeature : IObject, IRow, IRowBuffer

The extent of the feature.
